prompt: btc có thể short không hôm nay? tôi đang nhìn daily chart
assertions: The output fetches live BTC price data (not hardcoded or assumed)
The output clearly states whether a short setup is currently active or not
The output includes stop loss and at least one take profit if a setup exists

The output includes an invalidation level for the short thesis
